body: TUNGSTEN SMITHING -- calculated thorough 4-agent run complete. Shipped WARRANT#41-45 this final stretch: #41 forge-parallel Wave 0 (scorecard shape + real ratchet promotion rule + ceiling zones), #42 indicate r5 partial (hysteresis), #43 edge-2 r5 (ProbDB annotation via a parallel array, since ProbDB persistence was never confirmed), #44 edge-2 r6 partial (Bayesian posterior + capped-Kelly, heuristic combination honestly flagged as such, gated per the thesis own S2+S5 requirement), #45 forge-parallel Wave 1 (expected-time-in-regime, closed-form not Viterbi, and corrected the theses 8x8 claim to this projects actual 9-state shape). One self-caught compile error along the way (WARRANT#44 used a struct before its definition) -- fixed same pass, both compiles logged honestly in the ledger. Total this session: WARRANT#33-45 (13 warrants), SLS(48) through SLS(60), 9.62 through 9.74, every single one compiled 0-errors and identity-invariant-verified by diff review. Genuinely reached the floor now -- forge-edge-2 r7/r8 and forge-indicate r6/r7/r8 all need an actual completed, consented Strategy-Tester run to mean anything. Recommend attaching SLS(60) manually via the GUI when ready for a first real calibration read -- per the standing GUI-attach lesson, and because every gated stage built this session is waiting on exactly that data.
